steps: LAMP Colorimeteric Amplification Add 12.5 µL of WarmStart Colorimetric LAMP 2X Master Mix (DNA and RNA) - 100 rxns New England Biolabs Catalog #M1800S Add 2.5 µL of LAMP Primer MIX N-gene SARS-Cov-2 eurofins genomics Catalog #NA Add 8 µL of Water, nuclease-free Thermo Fisher Catalog #R0581 Add 2 µL of product from step 1 Incubate for 00:30:00 at 65 °C Read the colour of the reaction mix Red - SARS Cov 2 - negative Yellow- SARS Cov2 - positive

MIX saliva in 1x TE buffer Add 500 µL of 1L TE Buffer [1X], pH 8.0, Low EDTA (Tris-EDTA; 10mM Tris base, 0.1mM EDTA) G-Biosciences Catalog #786-152 and mix with 500 µL saliva sample Incubate at 65 °C for 00:10:00
creator: Alexandru Salceanu
